creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Reunited with the family! 👫🏻👫🏻

We’re spending most of our vacation days in my hometown Silay! It’s a quaint and historical city in Western Visayas region. 💕 

Second half of this reel was filmed in a seafood restaurant perched on stilts. I’ll share more of it soon so you can save and try when you’re visiting Silay. 

Stay tuned for more Philippines travel stories and reels. 🥰

transcription.text: Life is short, the world is wide, I wanna make some memories.
